targets.expr: count(kube_pod_status_ready{condition="false"}==1) by(namespace) - (count(kube_pod_status_phase{phase="Succeeded"}==1) by(namespace) or vector(0)) or count(kube_pod_status_ready{condition="false"}==1) by(namespace)

label_replace(node_volume_capacity_bytes_total_counter{node!=""}, "Source", "$1", "server", "(.*)")
* on(namespace, pvc) group_left(pv)
group by (namespace, pv, pvc) (
 label_replace (
 kube_persistentvolumeclaim_status_phase > 0,
 "pvc", "$1", "persistentvolumeclaim", "(.*)"
 )
 * on(namespace, persistentvolumeclaim) group_left(pv)
 label_replace(
 label_replace(
 group(kube_resource_relationship{target_kind="PersistentVolume"} > 0) by (namespace, target_name, name),
 "pv", "$1", "target_name", "(.*)"
 ),
 "persistentvolumeclaim", "$1", "name", "(.*)"
 )
)

group by (pv, pvc, namespace) (
 label_replace (
 kube_persistentvolumeclaim_status_phase > 0,
 "pvc", "$1", "persistentvolumeclaim", "(.*)"
 )
 * on(namespace, persistentvolumeclaim) group_left(pv)
 label_replace(
 label_replace(
 group(kube_resource_relationship{target_kind="PersistentVolume"} > 0) by (namespace, target_name, name),
 "pv", "$1", "target_name", "(.*)"
 ),
 "persistentvolumeclaim", "$1", "name", "(.*)"
 )
)
* on(pv) group_left(type, Source)
label_replace(
 label_replace(
 group by (pv, bucket_name, backend_storage) (node_volume_posix_read_total_counter),
 "Source", "$1", "bucket_name", "(.*)"
 ),
 "type", "$1", "backend_storage", "(.*)"
)

count by (namespace, pvc) (node_volume_capacity_bytes_available{node!=""})
 or
count by (namespace, pvc) (
 node_volume_capacity_bytes_available_counter * on(pv) group_left(namespace, pvc)
 group by (namespace, pv, pvc) (
 label_replace (
 kube_persistentvolumeclaim_status_phase > 0,
 "pvc", "$1", "persistentvolumeclaim", "(.*)"
 )
 * on(namespace, persistentvolumeclaim) group_left(pv)
 label_replace(
 label_replace(
 group(kube_resource_relationship{target_kind="PersistentVolume"} > 0) by (namespace, target_name, name),
 "pv", "$1", "target_name", "(.*)"
 ),
 "persistentvolumeclaim", "$1", "name", "(.*)"
 )
 )
)

list.label: Select Env
list.name: env
list.query: ALL : nprd , Dev : dev, Uat : uat, Sit : sit
